---
title: "Notebooks"
#sidebar: tutorials
toc: false
title-block-banner: "#445599"
listing:
  id: notebooks-listings
  contents: 
    - notebooks
    - notebooks.yml
  template: custom-notebooks.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  #max-items: 4
---

```{=html}
<style>
.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
    background: #7513f6;
    background-image:
        url("/images/purple-circles-bg.svg"),
        linear-gradient(90deg, #7513f6 0%, #420a5e 100%);
    background-repeat: no-repeat, no-repeat;
    background-size: 50% auto, cover;
    background-position: right, center;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeInBanner 0.2s ease-in forwards;
}
@keyframes fadeInBanner {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
    }
}

#title-block-header h1 {
    color: white;
    font-size: 50px;
}
</style>
```

Notebooks make learning interactive — you can run code, experiment, and understand concepts as they unfold on the screen.

<br>

## Explore the notebooks

::: {#notebooks-listings}
:::
